items.title: Database Patterns for Microservices
items.description: Transactional Outbox, Saga, CQRS, Event Sourcing, database-per-service, and data consistency patterns in distributed architectures.

items.title: Multi-Step Processes
items.description: Patterns for managing distributed multi-step workflows including Sagas (orchestration vs choreography), process managers, compensating transactions, and idempotency in long transaction chains.
